  "text": "The Kubernetes admission webhook processing chain spans several packages within kubernetes/kubernetes (sg-evals/kubernetes--v1.32.0) and kubernetes/api (sg-evals/api--v0.32.0).\n\n## Generic Webhook Dispatcher (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/generic/)\n\nThe core abstractions live in:\n- `generic/interfaces.go`: Defines the `Dispatcher` interface (with `Dispatch(ctx, attr, o, hooks)` method) and the `Source` interface (which exposes `Webhooks() []WebhookAccessor`).\n- `generic/webhook.go`: Implements the `Webhook` struct, the base type embedded by both the mutating and validating plugins. Contains `ShouldCallHook()` which checks namespace/object selectors and match conditions to determine if a hook should be invoked. The `NewWebhook()` constructor wires together the configuration source and a `Dispatcher`.\n\n## Mutating Webhook Dispatcher with Reinvocation Logic (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/mutating/)\n\n- `mutating/plugin.go`: Defines the `Plugin` struct that embeds `*generic.Webhook`. Initializes using `NewMutatingWebhookConfigurationManager` and `newMutatingDispatcher`.\n- `mutating/dispatcher.go`: Implements `mutatingDispatcher` which satisfies `generic.Dispatcher`. Its `Dispatch()` method reads `attr.GetReinvocationContext()` and implements reinvocation logic — if a webhook mutates an object, previously-run webhooks are re-invoked to allow them to observe and react to those mutations.\n- `mutating/reinvocationcontext.go`: Contains reinvocation context tracking logic used during the dispatch loop.\n\n## Validating Webhook Dispatcher with Parallel Dispatch (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/validating/)\n\n- `validating/plugin.go`: Defines the `Plugin` struct embedding `*generic.Webhook`. Initializes using `NewValidatingWebhookConfigurationManager` and `newValidatingDispatcher`.\n- `validating/dispatcher.go`: Implements `validatingDispatcher` satisfying `generic.Dispatcher`. Its `Dispatch()` method collects relevant webhook invocations and dispatches them in parallel (goroutines), then aggregates errors.\n\n## WebhookAccessor Abstraction Layer (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/plugin/webhook/accessors.go)\n\nDefines the `WebhookAccessor` interface providing a common abstraction over both `MutatingWebhook` and `ValidatingWebhook` types. Concrete implementations:\n- `mutatingWebhookAccessor` wraps `*v1.MutatingWebhook`\n- `validatingWebhookAccessor` wraps `*v1.ValidatingWebhook`\n\nConstructors `NewMutatingWebhookAccessor()` and `NewValidatingWebhookAccessor()` are used by the configuration managers.\n\n## Configuration Managers (staging/src/k8s.io/apiserver/pkg/admission/configuration/)\n\n- `mutating_webhook_manager.go`: `NewMutatingWebhookConfigurationManager` creates a dynamic source for `MutatingWebhookConfiguration` objects, using `NewMutatingWebhookAccessor` to wrap each webhook.\n- `validating_webhook_manager.go`: `NewValidatingWebhookConfigurationManager` similarly for validating webhooks.\n- `configuration_manager.go`: Shared base logic for configuration watching.\n\n## API Type Definitions\n\nThe `MutatingWebhookConfiguration` and `ValidatingWebhookConfiguration` types are defined in multiple locations:\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/api/admissionregistration/v1/types.go` (kubernetes/kubernetes, v1 API)\n- `staging/src/k8s.io/api/admissionregistration/v1beta1/types.go` (kubernetes/kubernetes, v1beta1 API - deprecated)\n- `pkg/apis/admissionregistration/types.go` (kubernetes/kubernetes, internal API types)\n- `admissionregistration/v1/types.go` (kubernetes/api repo, sg-evals/api--v0.32.0)\n- `admissionregistration/v1beta1/types.go` (kubernetes/api repo, sg-evals/api--v0.32.0, deprecated)"
}

```

## Efficiency Rules
